channel.title: Wasil Zafar — Gaming
channel.description: Latest gaming articles from Wasil Zafar

item.description: Customize Settings Cookie Preferences Essential Cookies (Required) Necessary for the website to function properly. item.title: Game Development Series Part 4: 2D Game Development
item.description: Master 2D game development - sprites, sprite sheets, 2D animation, tilemaps, parallax scrolling, and pixel-perfect collision detection.
item.author: wasil.zafar@gmail.com (Wasil Zafar)

item.title: Game Development Series Part 5: 3D Game Development
item.description: Learn 3D game development fundamentals - 3D coordinates, meshes, materials, textures, lighting systems, cameras, and skeletal animation rigging.
item.author: wasil.zafar@gmail.com (Wasil Zafar)

item.title: Game Development Series Part 10: Game AI Systems
item.description: Master game AI systems - pathfinding algorithms (A*, Dijkstra), finite state machines, behavior trees, decision trees, and NPC intelligence.
item.author: wasil.zafar@gmail.com (Wasil Zafar)

item.title: Game Development Series Part 7: Audio & Sound Design
item.description: Master game audio and sound design - sound effects, background music, spatial audio, 3D sound positioning, FMOD, Wwise, and audio optimization.
item.author: wasil.zafar@gmail.com (Wasil Zafar)

item.title: Game Development Series Part 2: Choosing a Game Engine
item.description: Compare Unity, Unreal Engine, Godot, and GameMaker. Learn what each game engine offers and how to choose the right one for your project.
item.author: wasil.zafar@gmail.com (Wasil Zafar)

item.title: Game Development Series Part 9: Game Design Fundamentals
item.description: Learn game design fundamentals - player psychology, game feel, feedback loops, reward systems, difficulty curves, and creating engaging gameplay.
item.author: wasil.zafar@gmail.com (Wasil Zafar)

item.title: Game Development Series Part 1: Introduction to Game Development
item.description: Learn game development fundamentals - understand what game dev really is, types of games, core components, and industry roles. Start your journey into creating games.
item.author: wasil.zafar@gmail.com (Wasil Zafar)

item.title: Game Development Series Part 11: Multiplayer & Networking
item.description: Master multiplayer game development - client-server architecture, peer-to-peer, lag compensation, netcode, state synchronization, and matchmaking systems.
item.author: wasil.zafar@gmail.com (Wasil Zafar)

item.title: Game Development Series Part 6: Physics & Collision Detection
item.description: Master game physics and collision detection - rigidbodies, colliders, raycasting, physics materials, joints, and physics simulation in game engines.
item.author: wasil.zafar@gmail.com (Wasil Zafar)

item.title: Game Development Series Part 13: Building Your Portfolio
item.description: Build your game development portfolio - portfolio project ideas, game polish techniques, professional documentation, and career preparation.
item.author: wasil.zafar@gmail.com (Wasil Zafar)

item.title: Game Development Series Part 12: Professional Workflow
item.description: Learn professional game development workflows - Git for games, version control, asset pipelines, team collaboration, and agile development practices.
item.author: wasil.zafar@gmail.com (Wasil Zafar)

item.title: Game Development Series Part 3: Programming Basics for Games
item.description: Master game programming fundamentals - real-time loops, delta time, frame-based updates, and essential design patterns like State, Observer, and Component.
item.author: wasil.zafar@gmail.com (Wasil Zafar)

item.title: Game Development Series Part 8: Building & Publishing Games
item.description: Learn game building and publishing - creating builds, optimization, QA testing, platform requirements, and publishing to Steam, itch.io, and app stores.
item.author: wasil.zafar@gmail.com (Wasil Zafar)

item.title: Game Development Assessment
item.description: Test your mastery of the Game Development series. All questions, no time limit, detailed feedback after each answer. This assessment covers all topics from the Game Development series.
item.author: wasil.zafar@gmail.com (Wasil Zafar)

item.title: Unity Game Engine Assessment
item.description: Test your mastery of the Unity Game Engine series. All questions, no time limit, detailed feedback after each answer. This assessment covers all topics from the Unity Game Engine series.
item.author: wasil.zafar@gmail.com (Wasil Zafar)
